_comment: SplunkGate + Splunk MCP Server coexistence example for Claude Desktop.
This config tells Claude Desktop to run BOTH MCP servers in the same
session — so a single agent has BOTH a safety-judgment surface AND a
Splunk-data-query surface in its tool list.
- splunk-mcp-server      — official Splunkbase app 7931, by Splunk LLC
Auth: token-based per the official docs
- splunkgate-mcp         — this repo's MCP server. Exposes 4
agent thinks 'I should search Splunk for X' →
agent calls splunkgate_score_prompt_injection on the user's text →
agent calls splunkgate_check_output_leak on the response →
if ALLOW: agent surfaces to the user.
Single Claude session, single tool list, two MCP servers, real safety
checks layered on top of real Splunk data access. No proxy, no fork,
no rebuild — just coexistence via standard MCP client config.
1. macOS install location for this file:
2. Replace YOUR_SPLUNK_HOST + YOUR_SPLUNK_TOKEN with your tenant values.
3. Restart Claude Desktop. Both servers appear in the tool picker.
For Cursor or other MCP clients, the same servers block transfers verbatim

env._comment: Per https://help.splunk.com/.../configure-the-splunk-mcp-server — token must come from a role with the mcp_tool_execute capability.

MOCK=true uses canned AI Defense responses; flip to false + set SPLUNKGATE_AI_DEFENSE_API_KEY for live calls. explainer_backend=ollama uses the local Hosted Model (default gpt-oss:20b) for verdict explanations — see scripts/setup_hosted_models.sh.
